name: qwen36-key-fix
description: Strips spurious trailing non-alphanumerical characters from JSON keys in cron tool params (Qwen 3.6 function-calling quirk)

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp src/index.ts dist/index.js && sed -i 's/: unknown//g; s/: Record<string, unknown>//g; s/ as Record<string, unknown>//g' dist/index.js
